# ntfy_token (Resource)

Manages an ntfy API token. Uses user credentials (not admin) for authentication. This resource does not support import.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ntfy_token" "example" {
  username = "myuser"
  password = "mypassword"
  label    = "automation"
  expires  = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password of the user to create the token for. Changing this forces a new token to be created.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) The username to create the token for. Changing this forces a new token to be created.

### Optional

- `expires` (Number) Token expiry as Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Use `0` for no expiry. Changing this forces a new token to be created.
- `label` (String) An optional human-readable label for the token. Changing this forces a new token to be created.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this token (same as the token value). This resource does not support import.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated API token value. This is sensitive and will not be shown in plan output.
